title: High-strength and high-modulus silicon monoxide for high-energy-density and fast-charging lithium-ion batteries
abstract: Published online: 24 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-72434-4 Energy-dense silicon-based negative electrodes repeatedly expand and shrink during battery operation, causing mechanical damage that degrades performance. Here, authors develop a deformation-resistant silicon-based negative electrode, enabling durable fast charging and high-energy operation.

title: Improved Online Parameter Identification and Adaptive Square Root Central Difference Kalman Filtering for Lithium-Ion Battery State of Charge Estimation
authors: Zhigang He, Ao Cheng, Xusheng Zhai and Miaomiao Lu
abstract: To address the limited accuracy and robustness of lithium-ion battery state of charge (SOC) estimation in electric vehicle battery management systems under highly dynamic conditions, this paper proposes a joint framework that combines improved online parameter identification with an adaptive square root central difference Kalman filter. The model parameters are identified online using a variable forgetting factor recursive least squares scheme driven by the predicted residual. By accumulating multi-order voltage residuals through a sliding window and adaptively adjusting the forgetting factor …

title: Development of Ni/Gr/C Nano-Electrocatalyst for Ultra-Sensitive Non-Enzymatic Electrochemical Glucose Detection
authors: Prakash Kumar and Adhidesh S. Kumawat
abstract: In this work, a highly efficient non-enzymatic electrochemical glucose sensor was developed using a Nickel/graphene/carbon (Ni/Gr/C) nano-electrocatalyst fabricated on a glassy carbon electrode (GCE). The nano-electrocatalyst was synthesized with a hydrothermal method and subsequently drop-cast onto the electrode surface to enhance electrocatalytic activity and electron-transfer kinetics. Structural and morphological characterizations using X-ray diffraction (XRD), transmission electron microscopy (TEM), field-emission scanning electron microscopy with EDX (FESEM-EDX), Fourier-transform infrar…
